Show / Hide Table of Contents

Namespace AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FileStorage.Providers

Classes

AzureBlobTenantStorageProvider

Tenant-isolated Azure Blob Storage provider. Each tenant's files are stored under a tenant-{tenantId}/ blob path prefix within a shared container.

LocalTenantStorageProvider

Tenant-isolated local disk storage provider. Stores files under {BasePath}/tenant-{tenantId}/{path}. Use for development, single-server deployments, or CI environments.

S3TenantStorageProvider

Tenant-isolated AWS S3 storage provider. All objects are stored with a tenant-{tenantId}/ key prefix, so tenant A can never access tenant B's objects even in a shared bucket.
